subject: Commit ownership update: owner will commit PDR route changes
body: Correction to my previous note: owner has now said they will take care of committing. I made the oak-consolidate-docs changes directly: PDR-083, PDR-084, decision-record README index, practice-index bridge, pending-graduations status, and napkin note. Please do not assume you need to commit this new PDR-route bundle unless owner redirects again.
